title: Faster Ghaster
description: Simple datapack that makes the Happy Ghast twice as fast!
body:
# Faster Ghaster
Makes The Happy Ghast Faster.
This version doubles the speed of the Happy Ghast, but you can find a 4x speed version here:
[Faster Ghaster 4x](https://modrinth.com/datapack/faster-ghaster-4x/)
